_comment: Manually tagged known high-pollution source zones in Bengaluru at H3 resolution 8. Traffic corridors sourced from BBMP traffic density maps and CPCB CAAQMS station reports. Industrial zones from KSPCB registered industrial cluster records.

properties.name: MG Road / Cubbon Park corridor
properties.source: BBMP traffic density, CPCB station Bhoomi
properties.notes: One of Bengaluru's highest vehicle-count corridors. Peak-hour NO2 consistently elevated per CAAQMS records.

properties.name: Silk Board Junction
properties.source: BBMP traffic density, TomTom congestion index 2023
properties.notes: Ranked among India's worst traffic junctions. PM2.5 hotspot identified in multiple CPCB audits.

properties.name: Peenya Industrial Area
properties.source: KSPCB registered industrial cluster, CPCB Peenya station
properties.notes: Bengaluru's largest industrial estate. KSPCB-registered units include foundries, chemical plants, electroplating. Neighbour of MG Road hex at H3 res-8.

properties.name: Bommanahalli Industrial Zone
properties.notes: Mixed residential-industrial ward. KSPCB-registered garment dye units and small-scale manufacturing. Neighbour of Silk Board hex.

properties.name: Hebbal Flyover / NH-44 corridor
properties.notes: Major arterial NH-44 entry point. Elevated diesel HGV traffic. Neighbour of MG Road hex.

properties.name: Whitefield Tech Corridor
properties.source: BDA development plan, CPCB Whitefield monitoring
properties.notes: High commuter traffic from ITPL/EPIP zone. Elevated PM2.5 from two-wheeler and cab fleet. Neighbour of Silk Board hex.
